response.original_title: The Incredible Hulk Coaster | Official Ride POV | Islands Of Adventure
response.overview: Step inside a high-security research compound commanded by General Thaddeus “Thunderbolt” Ross. You’ve bravely volunteered to be a test subject for a (potentially life-altering) science experiment based on Dr. Bruce Banner’s research. The ride that launches at 67 mph will get you enjoying moments of a zero gravity roll, racing faster and faster to turn you into the Hulk. At the General’s word, your group is blasted with gamma radiation.
response.title: The Incredible Hulk Coaster | Official Ride POV | Islands Of Adventure
